pr.title: [non-record track] BankLinear: cross-layer shared weight bank with learned + random mixtures

output.summary: BankLinear builds QKV weights by mixing shared learned and random basis banks, letting layers reuse parameters while retaining per-layer specialization.
techniques: shared bank of learned and random basis matrices
layer-specific mixing coefficients init with depth-aware profiles
reinvested savings into larger MLP capacity
